PATIENT TOOLS

Last reviewed: June 2026

Compare UK Medical Cannabis Clinics

Every major UK clinic, side by side: what the first appointment costs, what you pay ongoing, and which care model fits how you want to be looked after. Last reviewed 11 June 2026.

Mamedica

Verified Jun 2026

Pay-as-you-go · Lowest long-term cost

INITIAL £150
FOLLOW-UP £75
TRUSTPILOT 4.7★

£0 clinic fees from year two; annual review cycle once stable; repeat prescriptions free

Same-week video slots, including evenings and Saturdays

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Insomnia

Visit clinic

Medicann

Verified Jun 2026

Zero-fee · Tightest budgets

INITIAL Free
FOLLOW-UP Free

No consultation or repeat-prescription fees; ~£4.99 delivery per prescription; medication-only costs

Fast onboarding — prescriptions sometimes issued within days

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Insomnia

Visit clinic

Curaleaf Clinic (Access Scheme)

Verified Jun 2026

Subsidised access · Cheapest entry point

INITIAL £50
FOLLOW-UP Free

Access Scheme: £50 initial with free follow-ups

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Neurological · Psychiatric

Visit clinic

Releaf

Verified Jun 2026

Subscription (all-inclusive) · All-inclusive support

INITIAL £99.99
FOLLOW-UP Free

Releaf+ monthly subscription includes unlimited clinical access; concierge-style service; treats 60+ conditions

Guided onboarding — strong for first-time patients

Chronic pain · Anxiety · PTSD · Insomnia · Neurological · 60+ conditions

Visit clinic

Alternaleaf

Unverified — confirm with clinic

Low-cost membership · Budget + fast booking

INITIAL —
FOLLOW-UP —

Budget-category clinic; highest national clinic web traffic share — fees to be confirmed

Typically books within 1–2 weeks

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Insomnia

Visit clinic

Cantourage Clinic

Unverified — confirm with clinic

Pay-as-you-go · First-time patients

INITIAL —
FOLLOW-UP —

Fees to be confirmed

Typically books within 1–2 weeks; guided onboarding

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Insomnia

Visit clinic

Lyphe Clinic

Unverified — confirm with clinic

Pay-as-you-go · Established track record

INITIAL —
FOLLOW-UP —

One of the longest-running UK clinics — fees to be confirmed

Chronic pain · Anxiety · PTSD · Insomnia

Visit clinic

Integro Clinics

Unverified — confirm with clinic

Pay-as-you-go · Complex/chronic conditions

INITIAL —
FOLLOW-UP —

Fees to be confirmed

Chronic pain · Neurological · Palliative

Visit clinic

CB1 Medical

Unverified — confirm with clinic

Low-cost · Budget option

INITIAL —
FOLLOW-UP —

Fees to be confirmed

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Insomnia

Visit clinic

Zerenia Clinics

Unverified — confirm with clinic

Pay-as-you-go · Multidisciplinary care

INITIAL —
FOLLOW-UP —

Part of the Khiron group — fees to be confirmed

Chronic pain · Anxiety · Neurological

Clinic Price Tracker

Average initial consultation fee across major UK clinics, by quarter. Indicative market averages across major UK clinics — methodology being established. Values are seeded estimates pending the first full quarterly survey; treat as directional only until replaced by surveyed data.

Average flower price currently runs roughly £7.5/g across major pharmacies, with budget products lower and premium cultivars above £12/g.

About this data: Fees and details change frequently. Entries marked verified were checked against published sources on the lastReviewed date; unverified entries are indicative only. Always confirm directly with the clinic. The Ganja Club is an independent publication — clinics do not pay for placement, and order is set by your chosen sort.

This page is general information, not medical or financial advice. Eligibility and product decisions rest with a GMC-registered specialist clinician.

Medical disclaimer: The Ganja Club is an informational publication, not a medical provider. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice. Always consult a GMC-registered specialist. Medical cannabis has been legal on prescription in the UK since November 2018.
